channel.title: Agent on B'Log
channel.description: Recent content in Agent on B'Log

item.title: Rethinking RL Infra for Agents
item.description: Why agentic RL is breaking the assumptions that RLVR frameworks were built on – and what the next generation of RL infra needs to look like. A survey of Forge, ROLL, Seer and Slime, plus lessons from my own work on Polar.
